{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Lezaar
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lezaar]] is the most accomplished refiner of the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
